summary: Iteration 55: Verified all POS improvements - order types (takeaway/eat_in/dine_in), delta printing (printed_to_kitchen field + mark-printed endpoint), print settings toggles (3 switches in Security tab), receipt text formatting (formatLine function), and resend email button for staff.
critical_code_review_comments: OrderItem.printed_to_kitchen field correctly defaults to False (models.py line 82)
mark-printed endpoint correctly updates all items to printed_to_kitchen=True (orders.py lines 149-159)
create_order logic: order_type = order_data.order_type or ('dine_in' if table_id else 'takeaway') (orders.py line 47)
SecuritySettingsUpdate includes print_kitchen_slip, print_customer_receipt, use_kds_skip_print (restaurants.py lines 170-172)
GET/PUT /restaurants/my/security correctly handles print settings (restaurants.py lines 175-214)
formatLine uses fixed 32-char width for proper alignment (receiptGenerator.js line 98)
ORDER_TYPE_LABELS maps dine_in/takeaway/eat_in to display labels (receiptGenerator.js lines 43-47)
POSScreen orderType state defaults to 'takeaway' (POSScreen.js line 38)
Order type selector shows Takeaway, Eat In, and Table options (POSScreen.js lines 1248-1286)
RestaurantSettings Print Settings card with 3 Switch toggles (RestaurantSettings.js lines 886-930)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed orders for order type and delta printing tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 verified: (1) Order types work - takeaway, eat_in, dine_in (auto-set when table_id provided). (2) Delta printing - OrderItem.printed_to_kitchen field exists, mark-printed endpoint works. (3) Print Settings in Security tab - 3 toggles for kitchen slip, customer receipt, KDS skip. (4) formatLine function uses 32-char fixed width for receipt alignment. (5) Resend email button visible for staff who haven't completed onboarding. (6) generateDeltaKitchenReceipt exported and filters unprinted items.

order_type_takeaway.evidence: Backend test passed: POST /api/orders with order_type='takeaway' returns order_type='takeaway'

order_type_eat_in.evidence: Backend test passed: POST /api/orders with order_type='eat_in' returns order_type='eat_in'

order_type_dine_in_with_table.evidence: Backend test passed: POST /api/orders with table_id auto-sets order_type='dine_in'

printed_to_kitchen_field.evidence: Backend test passed: OrderItem has printed_to_kitchen field defaulting to False

mark_printed_endpoint.evidence: Backend test passed: PUT /api/orders/{id}/mark-printed marks all items as printed_to_kitchen=true

print_settings_api.evidence: Backend test passed: GET/PUT /api/restaurants/my/security returns and updates print_kitchen_slip, print_customer_receipt, use_kds_skip_print

resend_email_endpoint.evidence: Backend test passed: POST /api/restaurant/staff/{id}/resend-email endpoint exists and works

pos_order_type_selector.evidence: Frontend test: Takeaway, Eat In, and Table options visible in order type dropdown

print_settings_ui.evidence: Frontend test: Print Settings card with 3 toggles found in Settings > Security

resend_email_button.evidence: Frontend test: Found 3 resend email buttons in User Management for staff who haven't completed onboarding

delta_kitchen_receipt_function.evidence: Code review: generateDeltaKitchenReceipt exported at line 182, filters items where !printed_to_kitchen

format_line_function.evidence: Code review: formatLine at line 98 uses 32-char fixed width for proper alignment

order_type_labels.evidence: Code review: ORDER_TYPE_LABELS at line 43 maps dine_in/takeaway/eat_in to DINE IN/TAKEAWAY/EAT IN

mocked_apis_list: Printer functions (sendToPrinter) - no actual printer in test environment
